title: derris henryi
intro: Derris henryi, also known as the Derris tree or Kanthari, is a perennial plant native to India, belonging to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural insecticide and anthelmintic, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Derris henryi include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate fever, and act as an antibacterial agent, making it a sought-after remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Derris henryi can be made by infusing its roots in water or oil, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and gastrointestinal issues.
